name: PDS Debt
description_short: PDS Debt is a Scottsdale, AZ-based debt settlement firm. BBB A+ accredited. 1,358 Google reviews. Fee-after-settlement model for unsecured debt negotiation.
description_long:
PDS Debt is a debt settlement company headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, holding BBB A+ accreditation. The company negotiates with creditors on behalf of consumers to settle unsecured debts for less than the full balance. With approximately 1,358 Google reviews, PDS Debt operates under the FTC-regulated fee-after-settlement model.

Services include free debt consultations, personalized settlement programs, and creditor negotiation. The BBB A+ accreditation indicates effective complaint resolution and transparent operations.

Consumers should compare settlement fees, expected timelines, and overall approach against multiple providers before enrolling.

When evaluating debt relief companies, consumers should compare settlement programs against alternatives like debt consolidation loans, which combine multiple debts into a single fixed-rate payment. Credit counseling through nonprofit agencies offers free budgeting help without impacting credit scores. For those whose credit has already been damaged, credit repair services can address inaccurate negative items on reports. Personal loans for bad credit may provide funds for debt payoff at lower rates than credit cards, and credit monitoring services help track progress throughout the recovery process. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free debt assessment with no obligation to proceed
Customized evaluation based on individual debt situation and amount
Quick quote process completed in minutes
Multiple contact methods available (phone, web form)
Explicit compliance language around Do-Not-Call regulations and consent
Support for multiple unsecured debt types (credit cards, medical, collections, personal loans)
Appears to serve consumers across all 50 states based on state selection availability
cons: Website provides minimal details about specific debt relief methods, success rates, or fee structures
Operates as a lead generation platform rather than transparent disclosure of services
Lengthy consent disclaimers and TCPA language suggest regulatory scrutiny typical of debt relief industry
No information about credentials, certifications, or company background on main website
Extensive third-party lead source tracking indicates aggressive marketing but raises transparency questions
best_for: Consumers with $10,000+ unsecured debt seeking BBB A+-accredited settlement
Those exploring debt settlement as an alternative to bankruptcy
Individuals who want a Scottsdale-based firm with transparent fee-after-settlement pricing
diagnosis: PDS Debt has solid BBB A+ accreditation from Scottsdale, AZ. Compare fees and expected timelines against larger competitors like National Debt Relief and TurboDebt.
services: Unsecured debt evaluation (credit cards, personal loans, medical debt, collections)
Lead routing to appropriate debt solutions
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
